finding_title: Roadmap 依赖为空、Stop Code 混用自由文本，机器门不可可靠执行
scope: Add a V7.2 roadmap machine gate that validates registered stop_conditions, dependency references, self-dependencies, and dependency cycles without editing V7.1 historical baseline or V7.2 contract content.
non_scope: No real SMTP enablement, scheduler installation, Release upload, production restore, public schema, DB migration, source adapter, ranking, queue, email production switch, CURRENT, V7.1 historical baseline, V7.2 product/roadmap/stop-code contract content, P0/P1 closure, integrated production acceptance, or daily operation enablement change.

rules: stop_conditions must be a list of registered Stop Code identifiers.
Free-text stop conditions are rejected; narrative belongs in stop_notes or human-readable fields.
dependencies, depends_on, and required_dependencies must be lists.
Dependency references must resolve to a known roadmap task reference.
Self-dependencies and explicit task dependency cycles are rejected.
